name: TETA+PI Verification Protocol
description: Trust infrastructure for the Agent Internet — universal verification of businesses, journalists, artists, and organizations via official registries, C2PA-signed media, and Bitcoin OpenTimestamps.

mcp_tools.name: teta_search
mcp_tools.description: Search verified entities by name, domain, or registry ID

mcp_tools.name: teta_verify_entity
mcp_tools.description: Verify a specific entity and return trust level with proof

mcp_tools.name: teta_verify_endpoint
mcp_tools.description: Verify that a domain or endpoint belongs to a verified entity

mcp_tools.name: teta_get_proof
mcp_tools.description: Retrieve cryptographic proof (C2PA credential + Bitcoin timestamp) for an entity

mcp_tools.name: teta_resolve_intent
mcp_tools.description: TWIRA-ranked intent routing with full T/I/P breakdown, first_verified_at and proof URL; filters by entity_types and min_trust

mcp_tools.name: teta_get_profile
mcp_tools.description: Full public profile with public blocks for a verified entity

mcp_tools.name: teta_verify_claim
mcp_tools.description: Check whether a claim about an entity is supported by its verified content blocks

registries: US SEC EDGAR + state registries (NY DOS, CO SOS)
